brand.name: Rahman’s Associate
brand.tagline: Premium legal intelligence for Bangladesh counsel

meta.rootDescription: Rahman’s Associate is a premium legal-tech platform for advocates in Bangladesh to generate structured AI prompts for drafting, research, notices, petitions, agreements, and case preparation.

disclaimer.text: This tool is for drafting and research assistance only and does not replace professional legal advice.

hero.headline: Rahman’s Associate turns plain legal requests into polished AI prompts for Bangladesh practice.
hero.description: A premium legal-tech workspace for advocates who need structured prompts for drafting, research, petitions, notices, agreements, and case preparation in Bangla or English.

panel.description: Premium drafting infrastructure, refined visual clarity, and dependable AI prompt workflows for Bangladesh-based legal practice.

structured.title: Structured prompts
structured.description: Structures plain requests for legal drafting.

bilingual.title: Bangla + English
bilingual.description: Keeps bilingual intake clear and professional.

workflow.title: Advocate workflow
workflow.description: Fits notices, petitions, agreements, and research.

features.title: A practical legal drafting assistant, not a toy demo.
features.description: The MVP is designed for real advocate workflows: structured inputs, saved prompt history, reusable templates, and secure server-side AI calls.
features.structuredDescription: Convert a quick client instruction into a well-formed AI prompt with Bangladesh legal context, drafting sections, and placeholder logic.
features.libraryDescription: Start from curated templates for notices, petitions, agreements, bail, research, and client interviews.
features.workflowDescription: Server-side OpenAI integration, protected history, prompt injection resistance, and clear drafting-only disclaimers.

featuredTemplates.title: Start from battle-tested drafting prompts.
featuredTemplates.description: The library includes seeded Bangladesh-focused prompt templates that can be copied directly or adapted inside the generator.

demo.title: See the style of prompt the generator produces.
demo.description: These examples show how plain-language requests become structured, context-aware prompts for Bangladesh legal drafting and research.

login.pageDescription: Login to manage previous generations, mark useful prompts as favorites, and keep a searchable drafting record for your Bangladesh legal workflow.
login.cardDescription: Use your email and password to open the protected {{brand}} dashboard.
login.networkError: Login failed due to a network or server issue.

signup.pageTitle: Create an account to save and organize premium legal drafting prompts.
signup.pageDescription: The app supports guest generation, but signed-in users can keep prompt history, search past work, and mark favorites for later drafting.
signup.cardDescription: Register for {{brand}}. Passwords are stored as secure hashes in PostgreSQL.
signup.networkError: Account creation failed due to a network or server issue.

generator.pageTitle: Build a better legal AI prompt from one plain request.
generator.pageDescription: Select the legal category, prompt type, optional facts, and output language. The final prompt stays focused on Bangladeshi legal drafting, research, and court-ready professional structure.
generator.cardDescription: Describe the legal task in Bangla or English. The app will turn it into a structured, Bangladesh-focused AI prompt.
generator.requestPlaceholder: Example: I want a bail application for a criminal case.
generator.requestHelp: Write in Bangla or English. The system preserves legal intent and structures the resulting prompt for Bangladesh practice.
generator.factsPlaceholder: Add the relevant chronology, allegations, client position, and important facts.
generator.lawPlaceholder: Optional: mention statutes, sections, rules, or ordinances to consider.
generator.shortcutsDescription: Jump into a seeded template or use it as a starting point for the generator.
generator.outputDescription: Review, copy, regenerate, or download the structured prompt.
generator.savedMessage: This generation was saved to your dashboard history.
generator.unsavedMessage: Sign-in state detected, but this prompt could not be saved.
generator.emptyDescription: Submit the form with your legal request in Bangla or English. The app will return a polished prompt tailored to Bangladesh legal work.
generator.generatedSaved: Prompt generated and saved to dashboard.

suggestions.first: I want a bail application for a criminal case.
suggestions.second: আমার একটি লিগ্যাল নোটিশের জন্য স্ট্রাকচার্ড AI prompt দরকার।
suggestions.third: Draft a shareholder agreement prompt for a private company in Bangladesh.
suggestions.fourth: Prepare client interview questions for a family maintenance dispute.

dashboard.pageTitle: Review saved prompts, favorites, and your drafting trail.
dashboard.pageDescription: Every signed-in generation is stored in PostgreSQL so you can search previous work, reuse useful prompts, and maintain a consistent {{brand}} drafting workflow.
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by request, category, prompt type, or content
dashboard.favoritePromptsDescription: Quick access to your most useful drafting instructions.
dashboard.promptHistoryDescription: Searchable history of generated prompts saved to your account.
dashboard.noMatchDescription: Generate a new prompt or clear the search term to see your full history.

templates.pageDescription: Search, filter, copy, and open seeded templates covering criminal, civil, family, property, commercial, labour, writ, banking, cyber, notice, and contract workflows.
templates.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, category, or drafting goal
templates.promptDescription: Copy the template directly or use it as a starting point in the generator.

notFound.title: The requested page was not found.
notFound.description: The page may have moved, or the resource does not exist in the current {{brand}} workspace.

footer.tagline: Legal-tech drafting infrastructure for Bangladesh advocates

auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.passwordMax: Password must be 128 characters or fewer.
auth.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
auth.nameMax: Name must be 80 characters or fewer.

prompt.requestMin: Describe the legal task in at least 10 characters.
prompt.requestMax: Request must be {{count}} characters or fewer.

api.accountExists: An account with this email already exists.
api.registrationFailed: Registration failed due to a server error.
api.promptUnexpected: Prompt generation failed due to an unexpected server error.

criminalLaw.label: Criminal Law
criminalLaw.description: Bail, complaints, defense preparation, and trial-stage drafting.

civilLaw.label: Civil Law
civilLaw.description: Suits, plaints, written statements, and civil procedure research.

familyLaw.label: Family Law
familyLaw.description: Marriage, divorce, maintenance, guardianship, and custody matters.

propertyLaw.label: Property Law
propertyLaw.description: Land disputes, partition, title review, deeds, and possession issues.

corporateCommercialLaw.label: Corporate / Commercial Law
corporateCommercialLaw.description: Commercial contracts, governance, compliance, and business disputes.

labourLaw.label: Labour Law
labourLaw.description: Employment discipline, service disputes, and labour court preparation.

constitutionalWrit.label: Constitutional / Writ
constitutionalWrit.description: Writ petitions, public law issues, and constitutional remedies.

bankingChequeDishonour.label: Banking / Cheque Dishonour
bankingChequeDishonour.description: Cheque dishonour complaints, recovery strategy, and banking notices.

cyberCrime.label: Cyber Crime
cyberCrime.description: Digital offences, complaints, incident chronology, and cyber compliance.

legalNotice.label: Legal Notice
legalNotice.description: Demand notices, response notices, and pre-litigation positioning.

contractAgreement.label: Contract / Agreement
contractAgreement.description: Agreements, clauses, review prompts, and negotiation support.

drafting.label: Drafting
drafting.description: Generate structured drafting prompts for formal legal documents.

legalResearch.label: Legal Research
legalResearch.description: Frame a jurisdiction-specific legal research instruction.

caseSummary.label: Case Summary
caseSummary.description: Summarize facts, issues, and procedural posture clearly.

petition.label: Petition
petition.description: Create prompt structures for formal petitions and applications.

writtenStatement.label: Written Statement
writtenStatement.description: Prepare defense-focused prompts for written statements.

bailApplication.label: Bail Application
bailApplication.description: Specialized prompts for bail grounds and court-ready structure.

legalNotice.label: Legal Notice
legalNotice.description: Draft assertive but professional pre-litigation notices.

agreementDraft.label: Agreement Draft
agreementDraft.description: Build prompts for complete agreements or clause review.

clientInterviewQuestions.label: Client Interview Questions
clientInterviewQuestions.description: Prepare intake questions to surface missing legal facts.

english.label: English
english.description: Produce the generated prompt fully in English.

bangla.label: Bangla
bangla.description: Produce the generated prompt fully in Bangla.

bilingual.label: Bilingual
bilingual.description: Combine Bangla clarity with English legal terminology where useful.

detailed.label: Detailed
detailed.description: More explicit sections, detail prompts, and placeholders.

concise.label: Concise
concise.description: Compact and efficient while preserving key legal structure.
